tool.name: wfmash
tool.command:
#set $target_filename = "target.fa" #set $query_filename = "query.fa"
#if str($target.ext).endswith('gz') gunzip -c '$target' > '$target_filename' && #else ln -s -f '$target' '$target_filename' && #end if samtools faidx '$target_filename' &&
#if str($query_source.query_mode) == "two_fasta" #if str($query_source.query.ext).endswith('gz') gunzip -c '$query_source.query' > '$query_filename' && #else ln -s -f '$query_source.query' '$query_filename' && #end if samtools faidx '$query_filename' && #end if
wfmash --threads=\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} --map-pct-id=$map_pct_id --kmer-size=$kmer_size #if str($sketch_size).strip() --sketch-size=$sketch_size #end if #if str($mappings).strip() --mappings=$mappings #end if #if str($block_length).strip() --block-length=$block_length #end if #if str($group_prefix).strip() --group-prefix='$group_prefix' #end if $approx_mapping $no_split $self_maps $lower_triangular $sam #if str($sam) == "--sam" $md_tag #end if '$target_filename' #if str($query_source.query_mode) == "two_fasta" '$query_filename' #end if > '$output'

param.label: Minimum mapping identity (%)
param.help: MashMap identity threshold. 90 for intra-species, 70-80 for inter-species pangenome panels.

param.label: Sketch size (blank = auto)
param.help: MashMap sketch size. Leave blank for the default heuristic.

param.label: Mappings per segment (blank = unlimited)
param.help: Plane-sweep cap on mappings per segment.

param.label: PanSN group-prefix delimiter (blank = off)
param.help: Group sequences by everything up to the last occurrence of this delimiter (typically '#' for PanSN). Same value passed to pggb's -Y.

param.label: Approximate mapping
param.help: Skip base-level WFA alignment, output PAF mappings only.

param.label: Include self-mappings
param.help: Keep mappings of a sequence to itself.

param.label: Lower-triangular only
param.help: Only map seq_i to seq_j when i > j.

tool.help:
**wfmash** — pangenome-scale aligner.
A whole-genome aligner combining MashMap-style mapping with WFA (wavefront) base-level alignment. Used as the mapping front-end of `pggb`.
-----
**Modes**
- *Self-map*: one FASTA, all-vs-all mappings (good for building a pangenome graph from PanSN-renamed multifasta). - *Query vs target*: two FASTAs, mappings of query onto target.
**Key parameters**
- `--map-pct-id` — MashMap identity threshold (90 for intra-species, 70-80 for inter-species). - `--group-prefix` — PanSN delimiter (typically `#`). Sequences sharing a prefix are treated as one haplotype group. - `--mappings` — plane-sweep cap (`inf` by default). - `--block-length` — discard short mappings.
-----
The output is PAF by default (the format expected by `seqwish`). Switch to SAM for downstream BAM-pipeline use.
